title: Enchanted Netherite Apple
description: Enchanted Netherite Apple adds a new late-game upgrade for the enchanted golden apple
body:
Enchanted Netherite Apple adds a new late-game upgrade for the enchanted golden apple.

Use a smithing table with:
Enchanted Golden Apple + Netherite Ingot + Netherite Upgrade Smithing Template

This crafts the Enchanted Netherite Apple, a stronger version of the classic god apple with a custom dark purple netherite-inspired recolor.

Effects

Regeneration II for 5:00
Absorption IV for 5:00
Resistance for 5:00
Fire Resistance for 5:00
Strength II for 5:00
Haste II for 5:00

Speed II for 5:00
Jump Boost II for 5:00
Night Vision for 5:00
Water Breathing for 5:00

A simple for players who want an even more overpowered endgame apple.

Features

Smithing-table upgrade recipe
Custom recolored item texture
Keeps the enchanted glint
Built for Minecraft 26.1.2
